---
title: "Philosophy of Religion (an aside)"
date: "2008-04-02"
page-layout: article
---

Luca Incurvati has just drawn my attention to [this metaphysical speculation on the incarnation](http://metaphysicalvalues.blogspot.com/2008/04/counterpart-theory-and-incarnation-cos.html). Of course, the question whether you should be a counterpart theorist takes us into a whole different ballgame!
